title: passiflora lanceolata
intro: Passiflora lanceolata, also known as the yellow granadilla or passionflower vine, is a species of flowering plant in the Passifloraceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include sedative and antispasmodic effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Passiflora lanceolata include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as pain relief and improved sleep quality. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be consumed to reap these benefits, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any medicinal plant.
